channel.title: Group Tours on Passport Stories
channel.description: Recent content in Group Tours on Passport Stories

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
At Passport Stories, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following information:

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Phone number
  • Travel preferences and booking details
  • Payment-related information (processed securely via third-party gateways)

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:

  • Provide and manage travel services
  • Process bookings and payments
  • Communicate with you regarding your inquiries or services
  • Improve our website and customer experience

3. Payment Security

All payments are processed through secure third-party payment gateways such as Razorpay. We do not store your card or banking details on our servers.

item.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
item.description:
At Passport Stories, we aim to provide the best travel experience. Please read our refund and cancellation policy carefully.

1. Cancellation Policy

  • Customers can request cancellation by contacting us via email or contact form.
  • Cancellation requests must include booking details.

2. Refund Eligibility

  • Refunds depend on the type of service booked.
  • If cancellation is made before service processing begins, a full or partial refund may be issued.
  • Once the service has started or is completed, no refund will be provided.

3. Processing Time

  • Approved refunds will be processed within 5–7 business days.
  • The refund will be credited to the original payment method.

4. Non-Refundable Cases

  • Last-minute cancellations
  • Services already delivered
  • Third-party booking charges (if applicable)

5. Payment Gateway Charges

  • Payment gateway charges (if any) may be deducted from the refund amount.

6. Changes & Modifications

  • Any request for changes in booking is subject to availability and may incur additional charges.

7. Contact for Refunds

For any refund or cancellation request, contact:

item.title: Terms & Conditions
item.description:
Welcome to Passport Stories. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

1. Services

Passport Stories provides travel-related services including itinerary planning, booking assistance, and travel guidance. All services are subject to availability.

2. User Responsibilities

  • You agree to provide accurate and complete information.
  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your personal details.
  • You agree not to misuse our website or services.

3. Payments

  • All payments must be made in full before confirmation of services.
  • Prices are subject to change without prior notice.
  • Payments are processed securely through third-party payment gateways (e.g., Razorpay).

4. Bookings & Confirmation

  • A booking is confirmed only after successful payment.
  • We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any booking at our discretion.

5. Cancellations

  • Cancellation requests must be made via email or contact form.
  • Refund eligibility depends on the cancellation policy.

6. Liability

  • Passport Stories is not liable for delays, cancellations, or issues caused by third-party providers (airlines, hotels, etc.).
  • We are not responsible for any loss, injury, or damage during travel.

7. Intellectual Property

  • All content on this website is owned by Passport Stories.
  • You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute without permission.

8. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the website means you accept the updated terms.

item.title: Netherlands & Belgium 4 days
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling! 

Preparation Tips: Insurance, currency, visa info, SIM cards, and other  essentials to get you ready for the trip. 

Comprehensive 4-Day Itinerary: A tested plan to make the most of  your time exploring Belgium and Amsterdam.

item.title: Paris 4 days itinerary
item.description:
Prep Tips: Everything you need to know before you go—insurance,  currency, visas, SIM cards, and more.

Our Insights: Learn from our firsthand experiences, with tips we wish  we had known!

Detailed 4-Day Plan: Make the most of your time with a day-by-day  itinerary covering all the must-see sights. 

Activity Booking Links: Save time with direct links to book top  attractions.

item.title: Switzerland 7 Day Itinerary
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling!  

Preparation Tips: The best time to visit, travel insurance advice,  currency and visa guidance, SIM card options, and how to make the  most of your Swiss Pass.  

Detailed 7-Day Itinerary: A day-by-day plan with alternatives to match  your preferences and pace.  Attraction

Booking Links: Save time with curated links to the places  we loved most.

item.title: Ready To Go Products
item.description: All our digital products are available for instant download.

item.title: Traveling from 10 to 15 Days
item.description: What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:  A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).  Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.  A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.  Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.  Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable.

item.title: Traveling upto 10 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable

item.title: Traveling upto 6 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and morememorable.
